title: Fix admin panel access via logo tap and correct Instagram profile link

requirements.summary: Make the admin panel accessible by tapping/clicking the site logo in the Navigation and Footer components, triggering Internet Identity login and redirecting to /admin upon successful authentication
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the logo in the Navigation bar initiates admin login flow
Clicking the logo in the Footer initiates admin login flow
After successful Internet Identity authentication as admin, user is redirected to /admin
Non-admin users clicking the logo are prompted to authenticate but see an access-denied message if not admin
Logo appearance is unchanged for regular visitors — no visible admin hint

file_operations.description: Wrap the logo image in a clickable handler that triggers Internet Identity login (if not authenticated) and redirects to /admin after successful authentication. Use useInternetIdentity hook for login flow and useNavigate for routing. Add onClick handler to the logo img element without changing its visual appearance.

Wrap the logo image in a clickable handler that triggers Internet Identity login (if not authenticated) and redirects to /admin after successful authentication. Use useInternetIdentity hook for login flow and useNavigate for routing. Add onClick handler to the logo img element without changing its visual appearance.

Add an access-denied message or redirect for non-admin authenticated users. Check isCallerAdmin status and display an appropriate error message if the authenticated user is not an admin. Keep existing admin functionality intact for authorized users.

requirements.summary: Ensure the AdminPanel page provides full editing capabilities including uploading/replacing the site logo, hero cover image, artist portrait, managing artworks, and editing text content
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can upload or replace the site logo
Admin can upload or replace the hero cover image
Admin can upload or replace the artist portrait/profile image shown in the About section
Admin can add, edit, and delete artworks in the gallery
Admin can edit the artist name, tagline, and bio text displayed on the site
All edits are saved to the backend and reflected on the public-facing portfolio immediately
Admin panel is only accessible to authenticated admin users

file_operations.description: Add a new section for uploading/replacing the artist portrait image using the uploadArtistPortrait backend method. Include file input, preview, upload progress indicator, and submit handler. Add another section for editing text content (artist name, tagline, bio) with form inputs and updateTextContent backend method integration. Verify existing logo upload, cover image upload, and artwork management features are present and functional.

Add React Query mutation hooks for uploadArtistPortrait and updateTextContent backend methods if not already present. Include proper query invalidation to refresh the AboutSection and HeroSection after updates. Ensure mutations use the actor from useActor and handle loading/error states appropriately.

requirements.summary: Fix the Instagram link in the ContactSection to open the specific Instagram profile page instead of the generic Instagram homepage
acceptanceCriteria: The Instagram card/button in ContactSection links to https://www.instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar?igsh=bmRsdGx6Z3Nrd2Vy
The link opens in a new tab
No other Instagram links on the site point to the generic Instagram homepage

file_operations.description: Update the Instagram link href to https://www.instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar?igsh=bmRsdGx6Z3Nrd2Vy. Ensure the link has target="_blank" and rel="noopener noreferrer" attributes for security. Verify no other Instagram links in the file point to the generic Instagram homepage.
